prompt: A dramatic anime-style summer scene viewed from an extreme low angle with strong foreshortening: a young woman in a flowing white sundress and a wide-brim straw hat stands on a sunlit country path and reaches one hand directly toward the camera, her open palm dominating the foreground in exaggerated perspective as if inviting the viewer to take her hand. She has very long deep black hair streaming powerfully sideways in the wind, and a white ribbon tied to the hat also whips through the air. Her dress is sleeveless, softly pleated, light and breezy, cinched at the waist with a fabric bow on one side, with glossy sunlight highlights on her skin and fabric. The composition emphasizes motion, scale, and cinematic depth, with the character towering against a vivid cobalt summer sky filled with a few wispy cloud streaks and puffy white clouds near the horizon. Place her on a paved rural walkway bordered by rustic wooden fences on both sides, with green fields and distant low mountains in the background. Use crisp cel-shaded anime rendering with painterly detail, saturated colors, bright midday lighting, high contrast, ultra-clean linework, and a sense of awe and freedom. No text, no additional characters, single-subject illustration.
